title: 3 Stocks That Can Turn $5,000 into $25,000 in 10 Years
text: Strategically investing in high-growth stocks is the path to $25,000.

title: Invitation Homes Announces New $725 Million Sustainability-Linked Seven-Year Term Loan
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Invitation Homes Inc. (NYSE: INVH) (“Invitation Homes” or the “Company”) announced today that it has entered into a new $725 million seven-year unsecured term loan maturing in June 2029. The sustainability-linked term loan bears interest at rates based on the Company's senior unsecured credit rating, which equated to an interest rate of Adjusted Term SOFR plus 125 basis points at the time of closing based on the Company's current credit ratings. title: Want to Make Passive Income? Don't Let This Get in Your Way.
text: REITs can be the key to building a passive income machine -- and you don't need loads of cash to get started.

title: Invitation Homes: Stellar Earnings But Disappointing Returns
text: At the beginning of this year, I expected SFR (Single-Family Rental) REITs to outperform in 2022. That hasn't panned out so far. Invitation Homes reported stellar first-quarter results about a month ago, but the company's shares are slightly underperforming the REIT average.
